dialog_intro: Giant crabs from Lyonesse have been raiding our coastal supply routes.
dialog_lore: They grow enormous in the salt marshes and their claws can cut through steel armor.
dialog_call_to_action: Can you [cull the crabs] and restore safe passage?
dialog_in_progress: You will find the Lyonesse Crabs near the western coast of Lyonesse.
dialog_accepted: Good hunting champion. Albion counts on you.
dialog_reward: Well done! The supply routes are clear again.
description_step1: Kill Lyonesse Crabs on the western shores.

dialog_intro: Satyrs from the woodlands are terrorizing the farmers of Lyonesse.
dialog_lore: Left unchecked they will drive every settler from the region.
dialog_call_to_action: Can you [stop the satyrs] before they cause more damage?
dialog_in_progress: Head into the Lyonesse woodlands and cut down the satyrs.
dialog_accepted: May your blade strike true champion.
dialog_reward: Excellent! The farmers send their thanks.
description_step1: Hunt down Lyonesse Satyrs in the woodlands.

dialog_intro: Spriggans have grown bold and are attacking travelers on the road to Lyonesse.
dialog_lore: They guard old barrows in the hills and view any passage as an intrusion.
dialog_call_to_action: Can you [drive back the spriggans] and make the roads safe again?
dialog_in_progress: The spriggans are found near the old barrows in the hills of Lyonesse.
dialog_reward: The roads are safer thanks to you!
description_step1: Drive back the Spriggans near the barrows of Lyonesse.

dialog_intro: Bog Men have risen from the marshes and attacked a patrol of Albion soldiers.
dialog_lore: They crawl from the wetlands at dusk and drag men into the murk.
dialog_call_to_action: Can you [purge the bogs] and avenge our fallen soldiers?
dialog_in_progress: Search the bogs of Lyonesse for the Bog Men.
dialog_accepted: Go with the blessings of the king.
dialog_reward: The marshes are quieter now. Well done.
description_step1: Purge the Bog Men from the marshes of Lyonesse.

dialog_intro: Packs of wolves from the highlands are descending on Lyonesse settlements.
dialog_lore: The pack leader seems to drive them to ever greater aggression.
dialog_call_to_action: Can you [thin the wolf packs] before more settlers are lost?
dialog_in_progress: Find the wolves in the highlands north of Lyonesse.
dialog_reward: The howling has stopped. Fine work!
description_step1: Thin the wolf packs threatening Lyonesse settlements.

dialog_intro: Cornish Sprites have been stealing livestock and sabotaging farms across Lyonesse.
dialog_lore: Small but cunning they use illusions to confuse our soldiers.
dialog_call_to_action: Can you [root out the sprites] and put a stop to their mischief?
dialog_in_progress: The Cornish Sprites are found near farmsteads in central Lyonesse.
dialog_reward: Remarkable! The farmers can rest easy tonight.
description_step1: Root out the Cornish Sprites troubling the Lyonesse farmsteads.

dialog_intro: Ancient spirits have awoken across Lyonesse and refuse to pass on.
dialog_lore: They once served a lord who betrayed Albion long ago and remain bound to their dishonor.
dialog_call_to_action: Their presence corrupts the land and drives away settlers.
dialog_in_progress: Can you [banish the spirits] and let them finally rest?
dialog_accepted: Travel the ruins of Lyonesse and put the restless ghosts to rest.
dialog_decline: Go and bring peace to the fallen.
dialog_reward: The dead deserve their rest. Farewell.
description_step1: Banish the Lyonesse Ghosts haunting the ruins across the region.

dialog_intro: I have foreseen your end. Fallen beneath a foe of greater power in the heart of Avalon.
dialog_in_progress: Seek out creatures greater in strength than you and cast them into the abyss.
dialog_accepted: Return and tell me of your survival.
dialog_reward: Seek out creatures greater in strength than you and cast them into the abyss.
description_step1: Kill orange-con or higher monsters in the realm. Solo only.

dialog_intro: The frontiers are calling and Albion needs fighters with proven mettle.
dialog_lore: Only by besting the warriors of Hibernia and Midgard can we secure our borders.
dialog_call_to_action: Will you [answer the call] and prove yourself in battle?
dialog_in_progress: Head to the frontiers or battlegrounds to find worthy opponents.
dialog_accepted: For Albion! Seek out the enemy and do not return until five are slain.
dialog_decline: Albion thanks you for your time.
dialog_reward: Your deeds echo across the realm. Well done.
description_step1: Defeat enemy realm players in the frontiers or battlegrounds.

dialog_intro: Giant Araneids have woven their webs across the southern roads of Lyonesse.
dialog_lore: Travelers are vanishing and trade has come to a standstill.
dialog_call_to_action: Can you [clear the webs] and reopen the southern passage?
dialog_in_progress: The Araneids nest in the southern thickets of Lyonesse. Be wary of their silk.
dialog_accepted: May your blade not stick in their webs champion.
dialog_reward: The roads are open once more! Excellent work.
description_step1: Clear the Araneid nests blocking the southern roads of Lyonesse.

dialog_intro: Les forces des tenebres s'etendent sur Avalon. Les morts-vivants souillent la terre sacree.
dialog_lore: Prouvez votre foi et votre valeur en purgeant ces creatures impies.
dialog_in_progress: Le devoir vous appelle. Purgez 5 morts-vivants d'Avalon et revenez me voir.
dialog_accepted: Que la lumiere de Tyr guide votre bras.
dialog_decline: Que Tyr veille sur vous tout de meme.
dialog_reward: Vous avez fait preuve de bravoure. Je vous nomme Initie de Tyr.
description_step1: Tuez 5 morts-vivants dans Avalon pour prouver votre foi.

dialog_intro: La crypte d'Avalon est envahie par des anges dechus. Leur presence insulte la memoire de nos ancetres.
dialog_in_progress: Les ombres s'epaississent. Purgez 10 anges dechus et revenez me voir.
dialog_accepted: Allez purifier le sanctuaire. Chassez 10 anges dechus.
dialog_decline: Que Tyr veille sur vous tout de meme.
dialog_reward: La lumiere resplendit a nouveau. Prenez ceci en recompense de votre devouement.
description_step1: Tuez 10 anges dechus dans la crypte d'Avalon.

dialog_intro: Des heretiques de la secte de Khorne se cachent dans les collines, preparant des sacrifices impies.
dialog_in_progress: La justice ne dort jamais. Trouvez et eliminez 8 heretiques.
dialog_decline: Que Tyr veille sur vous tout de meme.
dialog_reward: Leur sang corrompu a cesse de couler. Tyr vous sourit.
description_step1: Tuez 8 heretiques de Khorne dans les collines d'Avalon.

dialog_intro: Les esprits malveillants de Khorne attaquent nos patrouilles aux frontieres du Bastion.
dialog_in_progress: Ne laissez pas le chaos franchir nos portes. Eliminez 12 esprits malveillants.
dialog_accepted: Soyez notre rempart. Eliminez 12 esprits malveillants.
dialog_decline: Que Tyr veille sur vous tout de meme.
dialog_reward: Le Bastion est sauf grace a vous. Que la justice regne.
description_step1: Tuez 12 esprits malveillants pres des frontieres.

dialog_intro: Vorrim BriseCrane le redoutable general de Khorne mene le siege de nos ames.
dialog_lore: Il reside dans les ruines sacrileges au nord entoure de ses gardes.
dialog_in_progress: Vorrim doit mourir pour que nous puissions respirer. Terrassez-le.
dialog_accepted: Pour la gloire de Tyr terrassez le monstre.
dialog_decline: Que Tyr veille sur vous tout de meme.
dialog_reward: Vorrim est tombe ! C'est un grand jour pour l'Ordre. Que votre nom soit chante.
description_step1: Tuez Vorrim BriseCrane dans les ruines au nord d'Avalon.
